derived.causal_summary: Remediated the system-code-graph doc-residue class surfaced by the 013 deep-review (iters 5-7). Code was already renamed to its own clean names (status.ts/scan.ts/verify.ts, code_graph_* tools, tree-sitter); only docs lagged. Removed every literal ccc reference across 11 docs, then expanded to the deprecation's botched ccc->'structural search' + ccc_*->'code_graph_* and detect_changes' find-replace residue (false bridge/binary/CLI prose, phantom tool, broken getstructural searchBinaryPath, dead semantic-index runtime) across 13 docs total incl ARCHITECTURE.md. Verified code clean (docs-only), seeds are manual/graph only, no binary/sqlite-vec. Renumbered feature_catalog (9->8) + playbook (14-18->13-17) to avoid ToC gaps. Gate: rg -i ccc == 0 + full residue sweep 0; validate.sh --strict PASSED.
